name: Insurance adjuster called after my forklift injury, did I mess up talking?
description: Yes, risky; lawyer handles adjusters from now.

mainEntity.name: Insurance adjuster called after my forklift injury, did I mess up talking?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, risky; lawyer handles adjusters from now.
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly; statements used against you for lowball or denial.[5] Context: They probe for fault. Key factors: Recorded calls admissible. Practical guidance: Stop talking, refer to attorney; polite hangup fine. Get advice first.
